title: Cinder Nerve
text: A burned nerve warns you of danger by inventing pain first.
flavor: It never lies, but it loves being early.
trigger: When a hazard would deal Heat or a wound.
penalty: Gain 1 Heat before the hazard resolves.
relief: Discard a medkit or exhaust a medic follower to cancel this trigger.
upside: If the hazard is avoided, lose 1 Heat instead.
